promotions.headline: 1 Month Free — Journal Squared 3 Only
promotions.body: Receive one month free on any lease term of 14 months or longer.

referral.headline: Resident Referral Bonus
referral.body: Were you referred by a current resident? Let your leasing agent know their name and apartment number before or when you apply — or email us at info@journalsquared.com. Both you and the referring resident will each receive a $1,000 account credit, applied 30 days after you move in.
